senses.gloss: irrationale, transzendente, reelle Zahl (ungefähr 2,71828), Basis der natürlichen Exponentialfunktion und des natürlichen Logarithmus
senses.gloss_en_full: Euler's number, an irrational transcendental real number approximately equal to 2.71828 that serves as the base of the natural exponential function and natural logarithm
